name: Côte-d'Or (France)
description: A gold lower field beneath two shields in the upper part: at the hoist a blue shield semé of gold fleurs-de-lis within a red-and-white checkered border, and at the fly a shield bendy of blue and gold within a red border.
history: The two shields are the arms of modern and ancient Burgundy, the duchy of which the Côte-d'Or was the heartland.

features.role: blue shield semé of gold fleurs-de-lis within a checkered red-and-white border (modern Burgundy)
shield bendy of blue and gold within a red border (ancient Burgundy)
